message:
fix(deploy): add build script for Cloudflare Pages static asset deployment

The Cloudflare Pages project is configured with pages_build_output_dir
of "dist/", but no build step was copying static assets there. This
caused frankentui.css and spec_evolution_v1.sqlite3 to be missing from
deployments — both were served as the SPA fallback HTML with text/html
MIME type, breaking CSS loading and database initialization.

Fix: add npm build script that copies the viz HTML (as index.html),
CSS, SQLite database, config JSON, OG images, and favicon to dist/.

Also adds dist/ and wrangler.toml to .gitignore (build artifacts).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -67,3 +67,9 @@ spec_review_findings.md
 # Node / Playwright (local only)
 node_modules/
 test-results/
+
+# Cloudflare Pages build output
+dist/
+
+# Wrangler config (downloaded, not source of truth)
+wrangler.toml
